metadata.name: Investigate Fire Alarm at City Library

description: A fire alarm is triggered at the city library after hours. An operator must verify the alarm and dispatch the fire department.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Fire Alarm' alert from the 'Main Library' building management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the critical fire alert.

nodes.task_description: Access the nearest interior camera feeds to look for signs of smoke or fire.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews camera footage but sees no immediate visual evidence of a fire.

nodes.task_description: Regardless of visual confirmation, follow protocol and dispatch the fire department as a precaution.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adheres to safety protocols and dispatches the fire department.
